rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Gilbert and Rivington, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Acts and Martyrdom of St Peter
Preaching and Martyrdom of St Simon
Preaching and Martyrdom of St James the Just, the brother of our Lord
Preaching and Martyrdom of St Bartholomew
Preaching and Martyrdom of St Matthew
Preaching and Martyrdom of St Philip
Preaching, Acts and Martyrdom of St Andrew and St Bartholomew
The Acts and Death of St John
The Acts and Martyrdom of St Mathias
The Acts and Martyrdom of St James, the son of Zebedee
The Preaching and Martyrdom of St Thomas
